title: Flow Action Envelope
description: The wrapper around every Flow action batch. An agent submits a single envelope containing one or more actions. The envelope carries metadata for audit, attribution, and optimistic concurrency.

v.description: Envelope schema version. Always 1 for this spec.

id.description: Unique identifier of the action batch. UUID v7 (time-ordered).

ts.description: Timestamp of the batch submission, ISO 8601 UTC.

actor.description: Who issued the action batch. Required for audit. Format: 'type:id'.

intent.description: Free-text description of the agent's or user's intent. Optional but strongly recommended for auditability. Surfaces in events and history.

actions.description: The list of actions to apply. Applied atomically: all succeed or none.

base_state_hash.description: SHA-256 of the state the agent believes it is operating on. Used for optimistic concurrency control. If the runtime's current state hash does not match, FLOW_015 is returned.

action.description: A single Flow action. Discriminated by 'op'. The full set of 'op' values is defined in the per-action spec files in this directory.

op.description: The action identifier. See per-action spec files for the catalog.

examples.intent: Trim the intro of the interview and add a bouncy text overlay at the punchline
Render the project to TikTok vertical
Atomic batch: split a clip, then add an effect to each part
